nasb.text: and He sent messengers on ahead of Him, and they went and entered a village of the Samaritans to make arrangements for Him.

esv.text: And he sent messengers ahead of him, who went and entered a village of the Samaritans, to make preparations for him.

cnv.text: 並且差遣使者走在前頭；他們去了，進入撒瑪利亞的一個村莊，要為他預備。

ccb.text: 祂先派人到撒玛利亚的一个村庄去预备食宿，

csbs.text: 他派了几个使者在他前头。他们就去了，进到撒马利亚人的一个村子，要为他做预备。
